title: Marketplace
description: The platform itself: a federated venue that HOSTS Offers, ENABLES a configurable set of Operating Models (b2b/b2c/c2c/d2c/b2b2c/p2p), and is reachable over many channels and surfaces (api/ui/cli/agent/tool/webhook). Federation across community-run instances uses the Matrix protocol; commerce follows the Agent Commerce Protocol (Offer/Order) and settlement the Agent Payments Protocol (Payment). The marketplace is configuration over the graph, not a fixed app — which models, channels, and protocols are live are all values it points at, never branches in core code.

federationId.description: Matrix server / room identifier this instance federates under (e.g. #market:fabric.community).
